zh.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 英國諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton是Richard de Acton的兒子，於1352年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓。他和Bridget Hamilton至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國。

zh-hans.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 英国諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton是Richard de Acton的儿子，于1352年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓。他和Bridget Hamilton至少有1个儿子。他去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Acton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, especially in Shropshire and adjacent counties, named Acton. Generally, these are from Old English āc ‘oak’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In Ireland the surname has been established in Connacht since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton was born in 1352, in Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England as the son of Richard de Acton. He had at least 1 son with Bridget Hamilton. He died in England.

fr.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton est né en 1352, à Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de Richard de Acton. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Bridget Hamilton. Il est décédé à Angleterre.

de.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton wurde 1352 in Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England, als Sohn von Richard de Acton geboren. Er hatte mit Bridget Hamilton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton è nato il nel 1352 nel Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England come figlio di Richard de Acton. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Bridget Hamilton. Morì nel England.

ja.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: イギリスノースウンバーランドアクトン アンド オルド フエルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Lawrence Actonは1352年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアクトン アンド オルド フエルトンでRichard de Actonの息子として生まれた。彼はBridget Hamiltonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスで死去した。

ko.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton(은)는 1352년 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴에서 Richard de Acton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Bridget Hamilton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국에서 사망했다.

ru.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Lawrence Acton родился в 1352 г. в местности актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия. Его отца звали Richard de Acton. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Bridget Hamilton. Он умер в местности Англия.
